title: rubus nudicaulis
intro: Rubus nudicaulis, also known as the low-lying raspberry or creeping raspberry, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus nudicaulis include its ability to reduce swelling, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
